Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BILLINFO_OBJ
Poid.Doc: The billinfo poid to be exempted

String.name: PIN_FLD_PROGRAM_NAME
String.Doc: The name of the program that calls this opcode

Array.name: PIN_FLD_EXEMPTIONS
Array.Doc: This is the exemptions array. There can only be one element in this array. The element-id is not significant. If this array is not passed, default exempt_status 1 is considered which is to exempt a billinfo.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_EXEMPT_STATUS
Enum.Doc: This field represents the new status.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
